transcript: I'm Treggs, founder of Seedplex, and I'm here to talk to you about something that I feel strongly about, and that's the fact that tokens need to become more. As I look around this room and this conference, one thing is clear: the talent in crypto is at an all-time high. Smarter, more determined founders are here, and they are here looking to build projects that they are quite passionate about. In the same space, we have crypto tokens which oftentimes are short-term instruments. They're about hype, they're about launching, and ultimately moving on all too quickly. If we want to see these crypto companies become truly dominant, they need the ability to compound across decade-long cycles. And that's exactly what we're looking to change at Seedplex. The current tokens have incredible distribution and community evangelizing effects. However, there's no fundamental anchor. These tokens often lack a clear tangible asset or business model as to why they should have value. They have a predictable sell pressure post-TGE, where early-stage investors are understandably looking to cash out as they are up multiples. And these tokenomics that are designed have an equilibrium in mind with just buyers and sellers... but they deal with the typical token inflation schedule which oftentimes is bringing in 100% or more of the supply into that whole system. The math works when it's just users interested in your token. However, that's oftentimes not the case. Despite all this, a clear market signal emerges. There is huge appetite for the earliest stage exposure. Pre-product, pre-revenue speculation exists... and nothing really compares to the velocity of funding that occurs on Solana. We can see all the things that have launched on Pump.fun... and it would be amazing to see this kind of infrastructure be used for something fundamental like equity. And unfortunately, the infrastructure on early-stage equity just simply cannot support this demand yet. And that is where the opportunity lies. Public equity already has strong infrastructure... however, these instruments already have strong technology and infrastructure both suited for retail and institutions alike. Early-stage equity, however, remains illiquid and exclusionary. The processes are manual, the access is gated, and global participation is difficult. If you're a sophisticated investor or a super user interested in early-stage equity of your favorite products, it can be near impossible to get that allocation. Making these processes that are high friction and gated is exactly where crypto can really help make those things better. What's needed is a new class of token: The Venture Token. This is exactly what Seedplex is bringing to the market. It has the benefits of equity fundraising with the distribution of a token. And all in all, what it enables is it helps your community, your prominent angels, even institutions to participate collectively in an equity fundraising round at the earliest stage. Seedplex spins up a Venture DAO... purchasing a SAFE collectively. This means two things: the Venture Tokens trade freely while the company stays equity-based. This is important because for the founders, it means they keep autonomy over the company that they care so much about. And number two, it leaves the company to be able to be acquired, as equity deals is the way acquisitions have been done for the last hundred years. We're very excited about this model... so I'm happy to say that coming in January 2026, the first Venture Tokens will come to market with four very companies that we are excited to launch. We have Amp Pay... Tapestry... Gud Trip... and lastly we have Gameshift... If you are a founder that is interested in keeping your company equity-based but still want all the benefits of a token distribution, please reach out. If you're a VC or investor interested in learning more about how these things work, we have our email there as well as our Twitter... My name is Treggs, I have a wonderful CTO in Dev Bharel, and together we're looking to bring companies and tokens that last the test of time. Thank you so much.

# Memecoin Activity Hits New Lows as Weekly Solana DEX Volume Stays Above $18.6B
240% Rise in Tokenized Assets Signal Market Rotation
[Ario](https://solanafloor.com/author/ario)
Copy link
* Published:
* Edited:
Sentiment across crypto has turned bleak. Prices are down, liquidations are routine, and timelines are full of talk about “lower for longer”. It is easy to assume users are leaving and activity is collapsing with price.
Onchain data from the past 100 days on Solana tells a more nuanced story. Rather than a simple exodus, the picture looks like a rotation. Some speculative segments are shrinking, while others such as tokenized assets and perpetual trading are taking a larger share of the pie. The market is clearly risk-off in some areas but not switched off.
## Memecoins Lose Share, Volume Rotates Elsewhere
![Trading Vol by Category](https://sf-cms.step.finance/assets/5ad43699-2ebc-4922-b063-cd98a1c5975e.png?)The memecoin sector has seen the steepest contraction in this rotation. Over the past 100 days, memecoins on Solana DEXs have dropped from 34.8% of weekly trading volume in early August to below 9.1%, reducing their relative share to less than one-third of prior levels. The last comparable period was December 2023, when $SOL traded near $70, total weekly DEX volume was about $5.4B, and memecoins accounted for roughly $650M. Despite today’s lower share, total weekly DEX volume now exceeds $18.6B, with memecoin volume around $1.7B. This indicates not a disappearance of activity, but a recalibration of speculative demand within the Solana ecosystem.
What has not happened is an equivalent collapse in overall DEX volume. Instead of disappearing, liquidity has moved. Trading in $SOL-stablecoin pairs, project tokens and Bitcoin has grown. Bitcoin’s share of weekly volume has risen above 4.5%, and tokenized assets have seen the most dramatic change: from less than 0.08% of weekly volume in early August to more than 0.188% (240% growth) over recent weeks.
## Mid-Sized Traders Gain Ground as Tiny Tickets Decline
![Trading Vol by Size](https://sf-cms.step.finance/assets/f9737986-49ca-424c-b291-97ff085abefa.png?)Trades with volume between $1K and $10K have increased their share of DEX activity. Over the past 100 days, their contribution to weekly volume has risen from 33.2% to more than 37%. This suggests that “serious retail” or mid-sized traders remain engaged and may even be taking a larger role in providing liquidity and volume.
At the same time, trades under $1K have declined. Their share of weekly volume has fallen by ab

# Bringing Cross-Chain Wallets Into Aptos: X-Chain Accounts

Listen
Share
By Maayan Savir
Press enter or click to view image in full size
![]()
*TL;DR: Developers can now onboard Ethereum and Solana users directly into their Aptos dApps: no new wallets, seed phrases, or bridges required. With AIP-121 and AIP-122, Aptos natively supports authentication from external wallets like MetaMask and Phantom.*
The blockchain landscape has never been more fragmented. In 2025, more than $2 trillion in digital assets were distributed across over 40 active L1 and L2 networks. Yet every ecosystem remains a silo, each with its own wallets, key formats, and onboarding flows.
Over the past year, the Aptos ecosystem has expanded into a global trading engine, connecting DEXs, payments, and real-world assets into one high-throughput, low-latency network.
Accessibility is the next step for scale.
Thanks to AIP-113, Aptos can support native authentication standards from other ecosystems directly on-chain. Dev

sources.title: Sei Expands Distribution Strategy with Mobile Innovation Program
sources.snippet:
Sei Expands Distribution Strategy with Mobile Innovation Program
[![Sei Blog](https://blog.sei.io/content/images/2025/09/sei_white_logo.svg)](https://blog.sei.io)
[Sign in](#/portal/signin)[Subscribe](#/portal/signup)
[Announcements](https://blog.sei.io/tag/announcements/)# Sei Expands Distribution Strategy with Mobile Innovation Program
[![Sei](https://blog.sei.io/content/images/2025/09/sei-logo--1.jpg)](https://blog.sei.io/author/team/)
#### [Sei](https://blog.sei.io/author/team/)
10 Dec 20252 min
![Sei Expands Distribution Strategy with Mobile Innovation Program](https://blog.sei.io/content/images/size/w1200/2025/12/signal-2025-12-12-135757.jpeg)
**Sei will launch a $5M Global Mobile Innovation Program to accelerate real-world blockchain adoption across consumer devices. As part of this program, a next-generation crypto wallet and discovery app will be developed to onboard global consumers. Following development, the Sei-based app will explore enabling stablecoin payments functionality.**
**NEW YORK, NY тАУDecember 10, 2025**тАУ Sei, the worldтАЩs fastest blockchain, today announced a major initiative to expand their distribution strategy with global consumers. Under this rollout, a next-generation crypto wallet and discovery app will be developed with plans to introduce stablecoin payments across consumer hardware devices like mobile phones.
> "This initiative represents a watershed moment for blockchain adoption," said Jeff Feng, Co-Founder of Sei Labs. "By embedding Sei's high-performance infrastructure directly into smartphone ecosystems, we're not just solving the onboarding problemтАФwe're reimagining how billions of users will interact with digital assets in their daily lives."
The user onboarding experience of the forthcoming app will be seamless using Google IDs, and will feature integrated multi-party computation wallet security, curated access to top crypto decentralized applications, and support for both peer-to-peer transfers and consumer-to-business transactions.
This move represents a fundamental shift in blockchain adoption strategy. Rather than requiring users to seek out crypto applications, Sei is leveraging mobile phone ecosystems to embed web3 capabilities directly into the devices and retail experiences that consumers already use daily.
> "We're moving from a world where crypto is something you have to find, to one where it finds you," added Jay Jog, Co-Founder of Sei Labs. "With sub-400ms finality and the ability to process thousands of transactions per second, Sei's infrastructure is uniquely positioned to handle the demands of mainstream consumer applications."
The collaboration also strengthens Sei's position in the competitive landscape of high-performance blockchains. While other chains focus on crypto-native audiences, Sei is targeting mobile phone ecosystems to open direct distribution channels to hundreds of millions of mainstream consumers.
### **About Sei**
Sei is a blockchain designed for fast, cheap financial transactions, combining the network effects of Ethereum with the performance of Solana. Sei has processed more than four billion transactions across more than 80 million wallets and has become the #1 EVM chain by number of active users. The team is backed by top investors such as Multicoin, Jump, Coinbase Ventures, and Circle Ventures тАУand includes talent from companies like Robinhood, Google, Coinbase, Databricks, Uber, and Goldman Sachs.
To learn more about Sei, visit[www.sei.io](http://www.sei.io/?ref=blog.sei.io).
#### Read next
[![Monaco Research Names Ex-Goldman Sachs, GSR Trading Executive Simran Singh as Chief Executive Officer](https://blog.sei.io/content/images/size/w720/2025/11/SIMRAN-SINGH_BLOG--2-.png)
### Monaco Research Names Ex-Goldman Sachs, GSR Trading Executive Simran Singh as Chief Executive Officer
Singh, former Goldman Sachs derivatives trader and Head of DeFi Trading at GSR, will drive institutional adoption and strategic growth of Monaco, the Wall Street-grade decentra

The visual directly represents this fusion of two different financial worlds. I included the text 'JAN 2026' as a holographic blueprint projection because the launch date is a key detail, and this diegetic integration reinforces the theme of futuristic construction and planning, fitting the Wired aesthetic.

One end of the bridge is anchored in dark, brutalist concrete pillars, representing stable, traditional equity. The other end stretches towards a void. The bridge's deck is made of a translucent, glowing material through which streams of lightтАФrepresenting liquid tokensтАФflow. Robotic construction arms are actively weaving these light streams into the concrete structure. In the dark, deep background, a holographic blueprint projection from a drone glows on a concrete pillar, displaying the text 'JAN 2026'.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A monumental, futuristic bridge under construction, viewed from an extreme low angle to emphasize its epic scale and immense height. One end of the bridge is anchored in dark, deeply textured brutalist concrete pillars, representing stable, traditional equity. The other end stretches dramatically towards an expansive void, creating significant negative space at the top of the vertical 3:4 composition. The bridge's deck is made of a translucent, glowing material through which vibrant streams of volumetric lightтАФrepresenting liquid tokensтАФflow dynamically. Robotic construction arms are actively weaving these luminous light streams into the raw, brutalist concrete structure. In the dark, deep background, a holographic blueprint projection emanating from a drone glows on a concrete pillar, displaying the clearly legible, glowing text 'JAN 2026', seamlessly integrated into the scene. The entire scene is lit with dramatic architectural lighting, featuring crisp rim lighting on the structures, sharp, well-defined shadows, and cinematic contrast, utilizing High Dynamic Range (HDR) for profound depth and realism. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, Unreal Engine 5, volumetric lighting, HDR, cinematic contrast.

editorial.headline: Seedplex Unveils Venture Tokens to Bridge Equity and Liquidity
editorial.standfirst: New protocol enables DAOs to hold SAFEs, combining token liquidity with traditional equity structures. The platform launches in January 2026 with four initial partners.
key_takeaways: Launch slated for January 2026 with partners Amp Pay, Tapestry, Gud Trip, and Gameshift.
The 'Venture Token' model uses a DAO to hold a SAFE, allowing tokens to trade liquidly while the company remains equity-based.
Solves the 'acquisition dilemma' by maintaining a clean cap table for potential exits while providing early liquidity to investors.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The structural disconnect between crypto tokens and traditional equity has long plagued the industry. Tokens offer incredible velocity and distribution but often lack a fundamental anchor to value, suffering from inflationary sell pressure post-TGE. Conversely, early-stage equity offers legal stability and acquisition potential but remains stubbornly illiquid and exclusionary. At Breakpoint 2025, **Seedplex** founder **Treggs** introduced a solution that attempts to unify these worlds: the **Venture Token**. 

Starting in **January 2026**, Seedplex will allow founders to spin up a "Venture DAO" that collectively purchases a SAFE (Simple Agreement for Future Equity). This mechanism bifurcates the asset: the Venture Token trades freely on liquid markets, satisfying the demand for early-stage exposure, while the underlying company remains a standard equity-based entity. This distinction is critical for institutional viability. It preserves the founder's autonomy and, crucially, keeps the company eligible for traditional M&A exitsтАФa path often closed to projects with complicated utility token entanglements.

The platform will debut with four diverse partners, showcasing the model's versatility beyond pure DeFi. **Amp Pay** is launching an all-in-one crypto banking app with IRL card spend; **Tapestry** offers a protocol to inject social features into any application; **Gud Trip** brings a consumer-focused cannabis crypto vape app to market; and **Gameshift** is deploying on-device AI systems that run locally to eliminate cloud costs. 

For the venture capital and institutional audience, this represents a significant shift in how "alpha" is accessed. The velocity of funding seen on platforms like Pump.funтАФwhere pre-product speculation drives massive volumeтАФcan now be directed toward fundamental equity. By wrapping the legal rigidity of a SAFE in the liquidity of a Solana token, Seedplex is effectively financializing the seed round, allowing high-friction, gated assets to move at the speed of a DEX.
